Home / Services / Ceramic Coating

Ceramic Coating

Multi-year protection against Savannah's corrosive coastal environment.

Our ceramic coating service isn't just a shiny top layer - it's a molecular bond that creates an impermeable barrier against Savannah's unique threats. The salt-laden breezes from the Atlantic accelerate oxidation, while summer humidity breeds mold in ventilation systems.

We begin with a full decontamination wash using water softened to prevent mineral deposits. After mechanical and chemical paint correction, our proprietary 9H ceramic formula is hand-applied in climate-controlled conditions - crucial for proper curing in our humid environment. The result repels everything from tree sap in Forsyth Park to industrial fallout near the port.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Iron decontamination to remove rail dust from Savannah's active train lines
  2. 02 Step 2: Multi-stage paint correction addressing swirls from palmetto fronds and sandy roads
  3. 03 Step 3: Precision application of marine-grade ceramic formula
  4. 04 Step 4: 48-hour curing in our humidity-controlled facility

Benefits

  • 5-7 year protection warranty
  • Eliminates 90% of wash-induced scratches
  • Self-cleaning properties reduce maintenance
  • UV protection prevents Savannah sun damage

Frequently Asked Questions

How does your coating differ from others in Savannah?

We use a hybrid formula developed specifically for coastal climates, with added polymers to combat salt intrusion. Most national brands don't account for our unique environmental factors.

Can ceramic coating prevent hurricane damage?

While no product prevents all storm damage, our coating significantly reduces the risk of saltwater etching and protects against flying debris scratches during evacuations.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with ceramic coating? Contact us today.
